Plot them as bar chart . </N> <C> mark [T] data problem_log encoding x [X] y aggregate [AggFunction] [Y] color [Z] transform filter [F] group [G] bin [B] sort [S] topk [K] </C> <D> problem_log <COL> log_entry_fix other_log_details log_entry_description </COL> <VAL> o a f d s i b e t </VAL> </D>
gold: mark bar data problem_log encoding x log_entry_date y aggregate none problem_log_id transform filter problem_id = 10
pred: mark bar data problem_log encoding x log_entry_description y aggregate count log_entry_description transform group x
